title: RISKPROG - Risk Scoring for Property Policies (LGARSK01) - Overview
---
# Overview

This document explains how property insurance policy records are processed to assign risk scores. Each record is validated and scored based on property type, claim history, and location peril data, with results used to support underwriting and pricing decisions.

## Dependencies

### Program

- RISKPROG (<SwmPath>[base/src/lgarsk01.cbl](base/src/lgarsk01.cbl)</SwmPath>)
